newsSince: No material new news since June 9. The June 18 AGM was routine (all proposals approved). Earlier datapoints (record Q1, two leading makers adopting the Metrion platform for GAA logic and advanced DRAM, multiple PT raises to $595-600) were already known by June 9. +3.5% move since June 9 is benign.

verdicts.rankRationale: WFE/metrology tier case (process-control intensity at advanced logic, HBM/DRAM, advanced packaging) is unchanged. Only the routine June 18 AGM since June 9. The +53% YTD rerating slowly consumes residual upside but no fundamental change. Hold at 5.
verdicts.bull: Process-control intensity rises with every advanced-node and HBM transition.
verdicts.bear: +53% YTD erodes the under-the-radar framing on this page.

verdicts.rankRationale: Metrology beneficiary of advanced nodes, packaging, HBM and photonics yields. No new info since June 9; the 'underrated' leg keeps eroding with PT raises and the YTD move, but with zero fresh catalyst, hold rather than cut on this crowding-sensitive list.
verdicts.neutral: Discovery underway; still a credible alpha name.
verdicts.bear: Multiple PT raises and +53% YTD mean it is less 'underrated.'

verdicts.rankRationale: Fab-tools pick-and-shovel bottleneck already balanced against YTD rerating in the June 8 audit. Only the routine AGM since June 9; no new fundamental evidence. Rank 22 in the fab-tools bucket still fits. Hold.
verdicts.bull: Leading-edge process-control input scarce and entrenched in advanced-node ramps.
verdicts.neutral: Bottleneck real but YTD rerating already balanced; no fresh news.
verdicts.bear: +53% YTD reduces under-owned alpha versus peers in the bucket.
